---
title: "Events"
description: "Seminars, symposia, networking events, and workshops hosted by the ASM-TMC Chapter"
---

The ASM-TMC Chapter hosts a variety of scientific and professional-development events throughout the year. Browse upcoming events below and check back often for new announcements.

---

## Upcoming Events

::: {.callout-note}
## Spring Symposium 2025 — *Frontiers in Infectious Disease*
🗓 **Date:** May 16, 2025  
📍 **Location:** Texas Medical Center, Houston, TX  
📝 **Description:** Our annual spring symposium will feature invited speakers working at the cutting edge of infectious-disease research, including sessions on antimicrobial resistance, host–pathogen interactions, and emerging pathogens.  
Registration details will be announced via our mailing list. [Contact us](../about.qmd) to be added.

<a href="ics/spring-symposium-2025.ics" download class="btn btn-sm btn-outline-primary ics-btn">
  <i class="bi bi-calendar-plus"></i> Add to Calendar (.ics)
</a>
:::

::: {.callout-note}
## Seminar Series — *Microbiology at the TMC*
🗓 **Frequency:** Monthly (third Thursday)  
📍 **Location:** Rotating TMC institutions  
📝 **Description:** Monthly seminars featuring researchers from TMC institutions. Each seminar includes a 45-minute talk followed by a Q&A and informal networking.  
[Subscribe to our mailing list](../about.qmd) to receive location and speaker announcements.

<a href="ics/monthly-seminar-series.ics" download class="btn btn-sm btn-outline-primary ics-btn">
  <i class="bi bi-calendar-plus"></i> Add to Calendar (.ics)
</a>
:::

::: {.callout-note}
## Networking Mixer — *Meet the Chapter*
🗓 **Date:** June 6, 2025  
📍 **Location:** Houston, TX  
📝 **Description:** An informal gathering for current members, new members, and anyone interested in learning more about the chapter. Light refreshments provided.

<a href="ics/networking-mixer-2025.ics" download class="btn btn-sm btn-outline-primary ics-btn">
  <i class="bi bi-calendar-plus"></i> Add to Calendar (.ics)
</a>
:::

---

## Event Calendar

```{=html}
<!-- FullCalendar CDN -->
<link  href="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/fullcalendar@6.1.11/index.global.min.css" rel="stylesheet">
<script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/fullcalendar@6.1.11/index.global.min.js"></script>

<div class="fc-legend mb-2">
  <span class="fc-legend-dot" style="background:#003087;"></span> Symposium &nbsp;
  <span class="fc-legend-dot" style="background:#0054a6;"></span> Seminar &nbsp;
  <span class="fc-legend-dot" style="background:#e8740c;"></span> Networking &nbsp;
  <span class="fc-legend-dot" style="background:#2e7d32;"></span> Workshop
</div>

<div id="event-calendar" style="max-width:900px; margin:0 auto;"></div>

<script>
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function () {
  var calEl = document.getElementById('event-calendar');
  var calendar = new FullCalendar.Calendar(calEl, {
    initialView: 'dayGridMonth',
    headerToolbar: {
      left:   'prev,next today',
      center: 'title',
      right:  'dayGridMonth,listYear'
    },
    height: 'auto',
    events: [
      /* ── 2025 upcoming ── */
      { title: 'Monthly Seminar — April',   start: '2025-04-17', color: '#0054a6',
        extendedProps: { location: 'Rotating TMC venue', description: 'Speaker TBA' } },
      { title: 'Spring Symposium 2025',     start: '2025-05-16', color: '#003087',
        extendedProps: { location: 'Texas Medical Center, Houston, TX',
                         description: 'Frontiers in Infectious Disease' } },
      { title: 'Monthly Seminar — May',     start: '2025-05-15', color: '#0054a6',
        extendedProps: { location: 'Rotating TMC venue', description: 'Speaker TBA' } },
      { title: 'Networking Mixer',          start: '2025-06-06', color: '#e8740c',
        extendedProps: { location: 'Houston, TX', description: 'Meet the Chapter — informal gathering' } },
      { title: 'Monthly Seminar — June',    start: '2025-06-19', color: '#0054a6',
        extendedProps: { location: 'Rotating TMC venue', description: 'Speaker TBA' } },
      /* ── 2025 past ── */
      { title: 'Monthly Seminar — March',   start: '2025-03-20', color: '#0054a6',
        extendedProps: { location: 'Rotating TMC venue', description: 'Speaker TBA' } },
      { title: 'Networking Mixer — March',  start: '2025-03-07', color: '#e8740c',
        extendedProps: { location: 'Houston, TX', description: 'Informal meet-and-greet' } },
      { title: 'Monthly Seminar — Feb',     start: '2025-02-20', color: '#0054a6',
        extendedProps: { location: 'Rotating TMC venue', description: 'Research talk by TMC investigator' } },
      { title: 'Grant Writing Workshop',    start: '2025-02-07', color: '#2e7d32',
        extendedProps: { location: 'Texas Medical Center', description: 'NIH grant writing fundamentals' } },
      /* ── 2024 ── */
      { title: 'Career Panel 2024',         start: '2024-11-15', color: '#2e7d32',
        extendedProps: { location: 'Texas Medical Center', description: 'Industry vs. academia: perspectives from microbiologists' } },
      { title: 'Fall Symposium 2024',       start: '2024-10-18', color: '#003087',
        extendedProps: { location: 'Texas Medical Center, Houston, TX', description: 'Antimicrobial Resistance' } },
      { title: 'Fall Kickoff Mixer 2024',   start: '2024-09-06', color: '#e8740c',
        extendedProps: { location: 'Houston, TX', description: 'Chapter kickoff and new member welcome' } }
    ],
    eventClick: function (info) {
      var p   = info.event.extendedProps;
      var msg = info.event.title
              + (p.location    ? '\n📍 ' + p.location    : '')
              + (p.description ? '\n📝 ' + p.description : '');
      alert(msg);
    },
    eventMouseEnter: function (info) {
      info.el.title = info.event.extendedProps.description || '';
    }
  });
  calendar.render();
});
</script>
```

---

## Propose an Event

Members are encouraged to propose seminars, workshops, or social events. If you would like to present your research, suggest a speaker, or propose an event format, reach out to our Events Coordinator via the [About page](../about.qmd).

::: {.callout-tip}
## Stay Informed
Sign up for our mailing list to receive announcements for all upcoming ASM-TMC events. Send an email with the subject **"Subscribe"** to [asm.tmc.chapter@gmail.com](mailto:asm.tmc.chapter@gmail.com).
:::
